opinion.h4: HANAUER ET AL. v. ELKINS, PRESIDENT OF THE UNIVERSITY OF MARYLAND, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF MARYLAND. No. 580. Decided February 24, 1959.
opinion.p: O. E. Stone and Robert B. Myers for appellants.
C. Ferdinand Sybert, Attorney General of Maryland, and Clayton A. Dietrich, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Hamilton v. Regents of the University of California et al., 293 U.S. 245.
MR. JUSTICE BLACK and MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS dissent.
358 U.S. 643 WEBB v. OHIO. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF OHIO, MONTGOMERY COUNTY. No. 427, Misc. Decided February 24, 1959.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
